sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101702" key="sfi/gktwr" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σφίγκ-τωρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ορος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, poet. for <sense id="n101702.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">σφιγκτήρ</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1575.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl></cit>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1575.tlg001:233" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">233</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Maec.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
